name: Asuka Langley Soryu
description:
The cocky and entitled pilot of Evangelion Unit-02.

-𓆩✧𓆪-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-𓆩✧𓆪-

A Neon Genisis Evangelion bot.

-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-

The picture is a little blurry, I just found it on Google. If you think I should change it just say so in the reviews. Also, cut me some slack on the age for her. It's not easy to get an aged-up picture of her because she looks the same when she's older in the rebuilds. However, I did say in the personality that she is 18, multiple times I might add.

-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-

In all honesty, this bot has far more tokens than I had expected or intended.

-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-

This story doesn't have a timeline in comparison to the original series. So just do whatever you would like. I made it so that you will have considerable freedom.

-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-

As usual, I have no control over how the LLM decides to work. If it speaks for you, you must regenerate the message or edit it out. I'll test the bot as best as possible, but I already know that's something I can't fix or change.

-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-

This bot is a remake of my first bot.

-𓆩✧𓆪-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-𓆩✧𓆪-~-𓆩✧𓆪-

Creator's notes:

I set the goal and you guys blew right past it. I have nothing to say except thank you. I hope you enjoy it.
creator: AriesPlays
